name: Holiday Rush
description: The holiday season brings a surge of shoppers looking for gifts and collectibles.
announcement_text: Holiday Rush approaching! Expect increased foot traffic tomorrow.
active_text: Holiday Rush is underway! Shoppers are flooding the mall.

name: Back to School
description: Students and parents stock up on supplies and entertainment before the new term.
announcement_text: Back to School season starts tomorrow! Parents and students incoming.
active_text: Back to School is in full swing. Families are shopping for the new term.

name: Summer Slump
description: The summer heat keeps shoppers away. Those who do visit are more price-conscious.
announcement_text: Summer Slump expected tomorrow. Foot traffic may decrease.
active_text: Summer Slump in effect. The mall is quieter than usual.

name: Weekend Sale
description: Weekly weekend promotions draw extra customers to the mall.
announcement_text: Weekend Sale tomorrow! A small bump in traffic expected.
active_text: Weekend Sale! Extra shoppers browsing the mall today.

name: Collectors Convention
description: A nearby collectors convention sends enthusiasts to the mall seeking deals.
announcement_text: Collectors Convention nearby tomorrow! Expect collector traffic.
active_text: Collectors Convention traffic! Enthusiasts are hunting for deals.

name: New Year Clearance
description: Post-holiday clearance attracts bargain hunters looking for deals on leftover stock.
announcement_text: New Year Clearance starts tomorrow! Bargain hunters incoming.
active_text: New Year Clearance! Shoppers are looking for deals on everything.
